parse.title: The Brutalizer
parse.wikitext:
{{Item info
|automaticge = 
|goldvalue = 
|goldefficiency = 
|similaritems = Serrated Dirk;Tiamat;Caulfield's Warhammer;Rectrix;Phage;Tunneler
|background = 
|notes = 
|strategy = 
|oldicons = 
|trivia = 
* The total [[gold]] cost is {{g|1337}}, a reference to [http://mmospeak.wikia.com/wiki/L33T_Speak Leet].
* '''The Brutalizer''' and {{ii|Serrated Dirk}} are the only epic items that provide lethality.
* {{ii|The Brutalizer}} and {{ii|Trinity Force}} are the only items that are not priced at a multiple of 25.
|quotes = 
|media = 
|revisions = 
|patchhistory = 
;[[V26.01]]
* Now builds into {{ii|Bastionbreaker}}.

;[[V14.19]]
* No longer builds into {{ii|Serylda's Grudge}}.

;[[V14.11]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Tooltip now correctly includes the lethality that the item grants (lethality was still being granted).

;[[V14.6]]
* Lethality reduced to 5 from 8.

;[[V14.1]] - Re-added
* Updated icon.
* {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Glowing Mote}} + {{ii|Pickaxe}} + {{g|212}} = {{g|1337}}.
* {{sbc|Stats:}} 25 attack damage, 10 ability haste, 8 lethality.
* {{sbc|Builds into:}} {{ii|Voltaic Cyclosword}}, {{ii|Axiom Arc}}, {{ii|Serylda's Grudge}}, {{ii|Profane Hydra}}.

;[[V5.22]]
* Removed from the game.
* Replaced by {{ii|Serrated Dirk}} and {{ii|Caulfield's Warhammer}}.

;[[V5.8]]
* Removed from the item recipe of {{ii|The Black Cleaver}}.

;[[V3.14]]
* Combine cost increased to {{g|617}} from {{g|547}} ''Total cost remains the same due to {{iis|Long Sword}} price being reduced.''

;[[V1.0.0.153]]
* Armor penetration reduced to 10 from 15.

;[[V1.0.0.152]]
* Combine cost increased to {{g|537}} from {{g|507}}.
* Added to recipe for {{ii|The Black Cleaver}}.

;[[V0.9.25.24]] Added.
* {{ii|The Brutalizer}}
** {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Long Sword}} + {{ii|Long Sword}} + {{g|507}} = {{g|1337}}.
** {{sbc|Stats:}} +25 attack damage.
** {{sbc|Unique Passive:}} +10% cooldown reduction.
** {{sbc|Unique Passive:}} +15 armor penetration.
|lethality=}}
